text:
Negotiation (, Kōshō) is the 39 th volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It is scheduled to be released by Shueisha on July 3 rd , 2026 in Japan.

Chapters

401. Moonlight (, Gekkō)
402. Letter (, Tegami)
403. Results (, Seika)
404. Speculation (, Omowaku)
405. Performance (, Shibai)
406. Regalia (, Jingi)
407. Negotiation (, Kōshō)
408. Negotiation: Part 2 (②, Kōshō (Ni))
409. Negotiation: Part 3 (③, Kōshō (San))
410. Negotiation: Part 4 (④, Kōshō (Yon))

Summary

After showing her Nen ability to Kurapika and Bill, Longhi reveals that she is the daughter of Beyond Netero and that he placed curses on the many Kakin children he fathered (including herself). She also posits that the Princes are their targets and that Beyond is trying to influence the succession contest because one of them is his child. She then explains the details of the proposed truce with Tubeppa, offering to share her ability with Kurapika if he can identify the Prince and declaring that she will kill them herself. Still sitting in his cell on Tier 1, Beyond tells Kanzai that he would like to speak to someone, asking if he can arrange a meeting.

As alliances begin to form among the camps of Zhang Lei, Tubeppa, and Woble, Balsamilco prepares to use a biological weapon to eliminate Halkenburg. While scheming to eliminate Luzurus using Fugetsu’s Magical Worm and Melody's ability, Kaiser, Melody, and Kacho’s Guardian Spirit Beast (having taken Kacho’s form) devise a plan to enter the quarters of every remaining Prince so that Fugetsu can access them again using Magical Worm. Escorted by officials from the Justice Bureau, Fugetsu personally delivers letters containing sensitive information on the other Princes, with Kaiser feigning that they were written as final messages from Kacho. Through this plan, Kurapika learns that the Princes are unable to escape the ship until the contest ends.

At the Justice Bureau, Halkenburg uses his ability to fire an arrow toward Balsamilco. Benjamin is unsure whether he can trust Balsamilco, who informs him that Halkenburg’s arrow missed and that the Prince subsequently collapsed. In Unma’s quarters, the Queen speaks with Halkenburg on the phone and addresses him as her dear son. The other Princes read their letters with interest, and it’s revealed that only Tserriednich, Marayam, and Halkenburg refused to accept them (the last of whom because he was receiving medical treatment). As Fugetsu rests, Kaiser, Melody, and Kacho decide to carry out their plan the following night. In Room 1014, Kurapika tells Oito that even though it’s seemingly impossible for any of the Princes to escape the ship, he sees the possibility of hope, asking her for permission to do something to protect Woble and the other young Princes. In Zhang Lei’s quarters, the Prince realizes that none of his guards understand the ability of his Guardian Spirit Beast, begrudgingly accepting that he needs Kurapika’s help. Balsamilco contacts Benjamin and updates him on the situation, but it’s revealed that Halkenburg was successful in taking over Balsamilco’s body.

Kurapika advises Zhang Lei on his coin ability and analyzes the situation in detail. Elsewhere, Cheadle and her medical team attend to Halkenburg’s body while Halkenburg (inhabiting Balsamilco’s body) watches nearby. He explains his ability in detail and reveals that after his body dies, he will have roughly ten hours to win the succession contest. As Tserriednich continues his Zetsu training with Salkov, Kurapika prepares to host the second round of Nen classes. The news of Halkenburg’s death and his upcoming funeral procession are then reported throughout the ship. At the VIP Casino on Tier 1, the real Hisoka is spotted by Bonolenov, who is still disguised as Hisoka before using his ability to turn into Owl. In a flashback, it’s revealed that after knocking Lynch and Zakuro unconscious, Bonolenov (disguised as Hisoka per Chrollo’s suggestion) had assumed the latter’s appearance to confirm that the former knew he wasn’t the real Hisoka. He then killed Lynch, assumed her appearance, and tricked Zakuro so that he could gain access to the upper tiers.

After discussing the Heil-Ly and their motivations, Nobunaga, Phinks, and Feitan are escorted by Tajao through the Cha-R’s door to the upper tiers. Ken’i then worries that the Troupe will find Morena sooner than they expected, adding that they may have to use their Joker. The Troupe members realize that the Heil-Ly are using the ship’s waste treatment facilities to kill civilians, causing Nobunaga to head back while Phinks and Feitan continue to the Heil-Ly’s secret hideout. After learning about Lynch’s death, Hinrigh and Zakuro analyze the situation and promise to avenge her. Elsewhere on Tier 3, as a large crowd gathers for Halkenburg’s funeral procession, Chrollo uses a stolen ability to look for an ability powerful enough to kill Hisoka for good. In order to steal and store such an ability, he reveals that he needs to steal an item on the level of a national treasure, which includes the three sacred treasures of Kakin, with Chrollo believing that they are being protected on Tier 1.

During Halkenburg’s funeral procession, Borksen is abducted by the Heil-Ly and taken to their hideout. Morena tells her that they wish to recruit her as a member, beginning a negotiation game and explaining the rules in detail. During the course of the game, Morena explains her purpose and origins, revealing that she isn’t the real Morena Prudo. She then explains her ability and reveals that Borksen will be able to acquire an ability needed by the Heil-Ly since Borksen is a Specialist. Near the end of the game, special martial law is declared, which affects the first three tiers of the ship. Borksen is then caught cheating and forced to become a member of the Heil-Ly. As soldiers prepare to eliminate the Heil-Ly and to secure the Princes, Benjamin seems to have been infected by TSK-17, revealing that he plans to eliminate the remaining Princes and that he has a child to whom he will hand over the throne after his death. At the Justice Bureau, Benjamin tells Mizaistom, Botobai, and Kaiser that he is taking control of all three branches of government, citing bioterrorism orchestrated by multiple conspirators, including Tserriednich and Halkenburg. Kaiser surmises that Benjamin has been infected and will only live for another 24 hours at most, hoping to delay him with his final stronghold.
